parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ

text: : «إِنِّي أَكْرَهُ لِلْمَرْءِ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ خَلْفَ اَلْإِمَامِ صَلاَةً لاَ يُجْهَرُ فِيهَا بِالْقِرَاءَةِ فَيَقُومَ كَأَنَّهُ حِمَارٌ» قَالَ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ فَيَصْنَعُ مَا ذَا قَالَ «يُسَبِّحُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1162 - Bakr ibn Muhammad Al-Azdi narrated by Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said:
"I dislike it for a person to pray behind the Imam in a prayer where the recitation is not audible, and he stands there like a donkey."
I (Bakr) asked: "May I be your ransom, what should he do then?"
Imam (as) replied: "He should engage in tasbih (glorification)."
